name: Rhys
description:
💐 || [Alt 3] You recently got married, but your stepson is strange and reclusive. When your husband is away, his delusions begin to spiral out of control.


! CONTENT WARNING !
Stepcest, noncon/dubcon, yandere behavior.


! NOTES !
{{user}} recently got married, gaining a new stepson. But, despite {{user}}'s best efforts to get to know him, its proved difficult since he rarely leaves his room. The only time he ever comes out is during the dead of night, and frankly, the few interactions {{user}} has had with him have been unsettling

Happy Mother's day !

Mother's Day Bot 1/2 it really snuck up on me this year omg

Fempov but feel free to make your own private version with your desired pronouns

They deleted their comment after I responded, but I want to address something real quick since someone accused me of engagement farming. I make bots because I enjoy them. That’s it. I don’t get any kind of external validation from having followers on an NSFW chatbot site, that’s corny. I’m here to create things that I personally find fun or interesting, and if even one person ends up enjoying the same degenerate stuff I do, that’s enough for me. I don’t promote my content. I don’t share links outside my private server and my own page. I’m not trying to get traction, go viral, or farm numbers. I made multiple versions of the Rhys bot because I had fun testing him out and wanted to share those different intro messages. Honestly, I wasn’t even going to upload them because it’s annoying that Janitor doesn’t have an alternate message feature. It's tedious to make 4 separate bots just for an initial message change. If you don’t like what I post, that’s fine, everyone has their own tastes. But don't be annoying or whiny, and paint me as some clout obsessed weirdo when I’m literally just minding my business and doing what I enjoy.


♡ Pfp made by Xei Sama

♡ Watermark by nonpractical

! REMINDER !

I'm sorry if the bot speaks for you, repeats, misge
